svg.text: [ ] Account created [ ] Policies set [ ] Store subscribed
[ ] Tax settings configured [ ] Return address verified
Sell Price - (Cost + eBay Fees 12.9% + Shipping) = Profit
[ ] Title: 80 chars max, keywords first, no fluff
TIP: Copy top seller format. Reverse-engineer what ranks on page 1.
[ ] Tool selected [ ] Supplier linked [ ] Rules configured
[ ] Set auto-repricer rules if using tools
[ ] Hire VA at 500+ listings [ ] Multi-account at 1000+
[ ] Systematize before scaling [ ] Document all SOPs
[ ] Check VeRO list before listing brands
[ ] Monitor eBay messages daily for DMCA
SUGGESTED BLOCKS: Morning = Orders + Messages | Midday = Listing + Research | Evening = Sourcing + Analysis
TIME INVESTMENT: Weeks 1-4: 3-4 hrs/day | Month 2+: 1-2 hrs/day (automated)
Not factoring ALL fees into pricing
No backup supplier for top sellers
EBAY DROPSHIPPING BLUEPRINT / PRINT. FILL IN. EXECUTE. / behike.co
